message:
refactor(tools): split bash chunk processing into ingest + emit phases

Decompose process_bash_chunk() into two focused functions:

- ingest_bash_chunk(): handles only byte accounting, line counting,
  and chunk buffer management — pure state mutation with no callbacks
- emit_bash_update(): handles only the on_update callback with
  truncation formatting and detail assembly — pure output

The run_bash_command() loop now batches multiple try_recv() chunks
into a single ingest pass before emitting one update, reducing the
number of callback invocations (and therefore UI redraws) when data
arrives in bursts. The original process_bash_chunk() is retained as
a thin wrapper for backward compatibility (marked #[allow(dead_code)]
since the main loop now calls the split functions directly).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
